TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjudjaas ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 40 buwan, 119 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . rhzyal kki'an lingay na Tjudjaas ga Gadu ru Kinilukuljan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjudjaas ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tju*jaas~…ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu kiŇčő≤oŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, . rńßzjal kki Ēan liŇčaj na tju*jaas~…ē …£a …£a*u ru kinilukuljan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč tju*jaas~…ē …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Tjudjaas ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 40 buwan, 119 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . rhzyal kki'an lingay na Tjudjaas ga Gadu ru Kinilukuljan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjudjaas ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
